title: Sepamoon Christmas Father's Day Best Dad Ever Pen - Black Ink Ballpoint in Classy Gift Box for Christmas Daddy's Birthday, Stationery, Office Supplies
features: What You Get: the package includes a black ballpoint pen engraved with Best Dad Ever and a beautiful matching pen case, a nice gift for dad that will put a smile on your dad's face

Ingenious Design: a calm black ballpoint pen with Best Dad Ever lettering engraved on it, a classic black and white color scheme, and a sturdy box with a white strap to hold the pen in place and prevent fraying, an unusual design for your father

Good Writing Experience: the black ink ballpoint pen has the right weight and comfortable grip, allowing the person who owns this pen to have a smooth writing experience, easy to carry and convenient to store

Safe Material: the best dad pen is made of a metal shell, sturdy and not easy to break; The pen case is made of paper, and the structural design makes it not easy to deform when being pressed; Refill is replaceable, which makes this dad pen gift have a long service life

Wide Use: you can give this cool and practical gift on Father's Day, father's birthday or other times when you want to give your father a gift, so your father can use this pen in many places such as office or study
description: Black Best Dad Pen Gifts Happy Father's Day Ballpoint Pen Gifts Best Dad Ever Pen for Birthday Office Work Features: The Fathers Day pen is made of metal material, reliable and not easy to break. After running out of ink, you can replace the refill for continued use. You can give this black Best Dad Ever pen as a warm and thoughtful gift to your father to express your love on Father's Day, birthday, Christmas, Thanksgiving and so on. Specification: Main material: metal, paper Size: Black ballpoint pen: approx. 14 x 1 cm/ 5.5 x 0.4 inch Black pen case: 17.5 x 4.3 x 2 cm/ 6.9 x 1.7 x 0.8 inch Color: as pictures shown Package includes: 1 x Black ballpoint pen 1 x Black pen case Notes: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size.
